title: strychnos progeliana
intro: Strychnos progeliana is a plant species belonging to the family Loganiaceae, commonly known as a poisonous plant due to its toxic compounds. Traditionally, Strychnos progeliana has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Strychnos progeliana include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat various infections. Herbal preparations of Strychnos progeliana are usually made by drying the plant's leaves and roots, then infusing them in hot water or mixing them with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, or ointments.
